Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify Approvals drawer opens and displays pending approval items
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin ([MODERNIZED_SYSTEM_ADMIN_USEREMAIL]). At least one pending approval document exists for System Admin.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Approvals' in the sidebar opens the top drawer and displays pending approval items with 'Response Required' links.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Approvals' link in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="3 Approvals" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: The top Approvals drawer expands and the 'Approvals' tab is selected.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the 'Approvals' tab is in selected state in the drawer
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Approvals' tab is selected and the drawer displays a list of pending approval documents.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify at least one approval item is visible showing filename link and 'Response Required' link
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Response Required" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Each visible approval item shows: file thumbnail image, filename as a clickable link, requester name (e.g. 'by System Admin1'), 'Response Required' link, and approval question text.
Profile dropdown opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify 'Response Required' link in Approvals drawer navigates to the approval respond page
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin. At least one pending approval exists in the Approvals drawer.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Response Required' on a pending approval item navigates to the corresponding approval respond page.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Approvals' link in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="3 Approvals" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Approvals drawer opens showing pending approval items.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Response Required' link on the first visible pending approval item
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Response Required" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to the approval respond page. URL matches pattern /resources/<id>/approvals/<id>/respond.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the approval respond page is loaded
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Approval respond page is displayed with document details and approval action options.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Home' link in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User returns to the Home page.
Profile dropdown opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify 'Manage' link in Approvals drawer navigates to the approvals manage page
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Manage' in the Approvals drawer navigates to the approvals management page at /drawer/manage.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Approvals' link in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="3 Approvals" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Approvals drawer opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Manage' link in the Approvals drawer
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to the approvals manage page at /drawer/manage.
